name: vaper
description: Single-plugin marketplace for vaper, a Claude Code status line widget that shows how much water you've boiled with Claude today by converting daily token usage into joules of water heated to 100°C.

plugins.name: vaper
plugins.description: Status line widget that shows how much water you've boiled with Claude today, by converting daily token usage into joules and then milliliters of water heated from 20°C to 100°C.
